definition.name: near_fixed_algebra
definition.definition: def-near-fixed-algebra (original, locked). For P the spectral idempotent of an almost-idempotent unital positive Phi, the near-fixed algebra is A=Im P=Ker(1-P) subset B(H)_sa, a real subspace containing 1, with the projected Jordan product a•b:=P(a o b) (o the ambient Jordan product). The order, unit 1, and order-unit norm on A are inherited EXACTLY from B(H)_sa; only • is approximate. Here A_+ = A cap B(H)_+.
